questionHtml:
Consider the function defined by fx=kx-5x-k, where x ∈ ℝ \ k and k2≠5. 

State the equation of the vertical asymptote on the graph of y=f(x).
markschemeHtml:
* This question is from an exam for a previous syllabus, and may contain minor differences in marking or structure.

x=k      A1


[1 mark]

meta.title: State the equation of the vertical asymptote on the graph of y=f(x).
